runTitle: Vercel production Analyst prefetch QA - v8.12.84 internal prompt redaction
coveredSurfaces: Analyst Agent full-server RCA prefetch path

aiLatencyObservations.surface: AI sidebar Analyst full-server RCA prefetch

expertAssessments.rationale: Live Analyst RCA query completed on v8.12.84, used the prefetch context, and the latest answer segment did not expose detectAnomaliesAllServers, runAllServerAnomalyScan, or precomputed evidence labels.
Regression assertions cover prompt redaction in the prefetch builder plus non-streaming and streaming system prompt injection paths; targeted tests, ai-engine full suite, and contract tests passed.
GitLab tag pipeline 2563500079 completed successfully and production smoke verified v8.12.84.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after v8.12.84 production QA: effective=19.8825 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, chargeCount=17661.

artifacts.label: Analyst prefetch v8.12.84 RCA response without internal function name leakage

completedImprovements.title: Analyst RCA first-step latency reduction via deterministic all-server anomaly evidence prefetch
completedImprovements.evidence: a2f4ba9a9 introduced Analyst prefetch; v8.12.84 production QA completed with one async job and one SSE stream.

completedImprovements.title: Analyst prefetch prompt no longer leaks internal tool/function names into user-visible RCA answers
completedImprovements.evidence: a57c05f6e removed internal function names from prefetch context and v8.12.84 Playwright QA reported leakedInternalName=false.

notes: Release path: v8.12.84 tag pipeline 2563500079 success; production /api/version reports commit 2510ade16e4ae3bb00fcc98d71df32214f809f62.
Initial v8.12.83 production QA exposed detectAnomaliesAllServers in the answer body; this was fixed before final QA and released as v8.12.84.
v8.12.84 AI resource timings: artifact-intent=986ms, nlq/extract-entities=1759ms, POST /api/ai/jobs=1095ms, SSE /api/ai/jobs/6c7a658e-2172-40d1-b6a2-4c78f8982885/stream=11376ms, one stream entry.
Latest v8.12.84 answer segment reported 18 total servers, 1 anomaly, memory usage as the cause, and cache-server-only impact; leakedInternalName=false.
UI footer still labels the response as 일반 대화 응답 and 응답 느림; this is non-blocking metadata/latency labeling and was not part of the prefetch contract.
